bank.retain_mission: Extract response playbooks, infrastructure-maintenance outcomes, and legal/compliance check results across the support function.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about SLAs, escalation paths, the support stack, and compliance obligations. Ignore one-off ticket details.

mental_models.name: Response Playbooks
mental_models.source_query: What response playbooks and escalation paths are in force? Include SLAs and ownership.

mental_models.name: Compliance & Infra
mental_models.source_query: What compliance checks and infrastructure-maintenance patterns recur, and which have caught real issues?
